title: Freakscene: The Story of Dinosaur Jr.
original_title: Freakscene: The Story of Dinosaur Jr.
overview: The American indie rock band “Dinosaur Jr.” is a radical group with an unmistakeable sound. The film tells the story the three charismatic guys in the band: J. Mascis (vocals, guitar), Lou Barlow (bass) and Murph (drums).
